name: Date Nut Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, milk, and butter in a saucepan. Bring to a boil until the mixture forms a soft ball.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Add nuts and pitted dates, then beat until stiff.
4. Place a wet tea towel on a plate and pour the batter onto it.
5. Roll the batter into a long roll and refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Slice when ready to serve.
Hope this is what you are looking for came out of a Czech cookbook. Pat
